member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.RecoverySKU
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.RecoverySKU.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: List of valid Recovery BitVectors for this sku.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.RecoverySKU.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Prime SharedStorage requirement to have default constructor.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.RecoverySKU.SkuGroupName
member.summary: Gets or sets the SKU Group name.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.RecoverySKU.RecoveryArea
member.summary: Gets or sets the RecoveryArea name.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.RecoverySKU.RecoveryBitVectors
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of Valid Recovery BitVectors for this sku.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.RecoverySKU.IsValid(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.BitArray,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String}@)
member.summary: Determines if the given BitArray is valid for this sku.
member.param: BitMask to apply (bits that are a 1 are not compared).
return list of matching bit vector.
member.returns: true if the sku is valid.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.RecoverySKU.Retrieve(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Retrieve the given sku group from SharedStorage.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.RecoverySKU.Store(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Saves this object to shared storage.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.SkuDefinitionFile
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SkuDefinitionFile.IpArea
member.summary: Gets or sets the Value.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.SkuDefinitionFile.Area
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SkuDefinitionFile.Area.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the Area name.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SkuDefinitionFile.Area.SkuGroups
member.summary: Gets or sets the Value.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.SkuDefinitionFile.Area.SKUGroup
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SkuDefinitionFile.Area.SKUGroup.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the SKU Group name.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SkuDefinitionFile.Area.SKUGroup.RecoverySkus
member.summary: Gets or sets the Value.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.SkuDefinitionFile.Area.SKUGroup.SKU
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SkuDefinitionFile.Area.SKUGroup.SKU.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the SKU name.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SkuDefinitionFile.Area.SKUGroup.SKU.RecoveryBitVector
member.summary: Gets or sets the recovery bit vector for this sku.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.SkuRule
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SkuRule.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the Name of this rule. This is how it's referenced by the test program.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SkuRule.RecoveryArea
member.summary: Gets or sets SKU RecoveryArea to use with this rule.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SkuRule.ValidSkuGroups
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of valid sku groups for this rule. All must exist within the given RecoveryArea.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SkuRule.ValidCombinations
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of valid combinations.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SkuRule.BitMask
member.summary: Gets or sets a BitMask (binary string) where a 1 means that bit location is ignored when evaluating the rules.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SkuRule.Trackers
member.summary: Gets or sets the Trackers to use when evaluating this rule.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.SkuRule.Retrieve(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the named SkuRule from shared storage.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.SkuRule.Store(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Saves this object to shared storage.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.SkuRule.IsValidRule
member.summary: Checks that either ValidSKUs or ValidCombinations have at least one element but not both.
member.returns: True if the condition is satisfied, False otherwise.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.SkuRuleContainer
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SkuRuleContainer.Rules
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of Rules.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryFactory
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryFactory.CurrentSlice
member.summary: Gets or sets current slice index.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTracker
member.summary: Main DieRecovery Class.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTracker.#ctor(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: List of names of the Trackers to load.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTracker.GenerateResultsFromRules(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Int32},System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Take the return value from running the rules and get the bits that belong to this Tracking structure.
member.param: Map of where each tracker bit is in the rules bit vector.
List of passing bit vectors from the rules.
member.returns: bit vector containing only the tracker bits.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase
member.summary: Main DieRecovery Class.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.#ctor(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: List of names of the Trackers to load.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.SessionContext
member.summary: Gets or sets the session context.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.Size
member.summary: Gets or sets the size of the tracker.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.Names
member.summary: Gets the names of the trackers.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.NameForLogging
member.summary: Gets the names of the trackers for logging.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.TestName
member.summary: Gets current instance name for this tracker.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.LogHistory
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether to log history.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.Log(System.String,System.Collections.BitArray,System.Collections.BitArray,System.Collections.BitArray,System.Collections.BitArray,System.String)
member.summary: Logs the current state of the trackers.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.RuleResult
member.summary: Container to hold the results of a running a SKU-based rule.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.RuleResult.#ctor(System.Collections.BitArray,System.Collections.BitArray,System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: BitArray for Rules check using the PreTest Token Values.
BitArray for Rules check using the TestResults Values only.
BitArray for Rules check using the Final PostTest/Merged Values.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.RuleResult.BitVectorPreTest
member.summary: Gets the string value of the bitvector used for the PreTest rules check.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.RuleResult.BitVectorTestOnly
member.summary: Gets the string value of the bitvector used for the TestOnly rules check.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.RuleResult.BitVectorPostTest
member.summary: Gets the string value of the bitvector used for the PostCheck/Standard rules check.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.RuleResult.IsPostTestRulePassing
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the rule passed.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.RuleResult.IsPreTestRulePassing
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the outgoing tracker was passing before evaluation.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.RuleResult.IsTestResultOnlyRulePassing
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the test result was passing.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.RuleResult.PassingSKU
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the passing sku.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.RuleResult.PassingTestVector
member.summary: Gets or sets the passing BitVector for just the bits in this tracker.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.RuleResult.PassingRuleVector
member.summary: Gets or sets the full passing BitVector for this rule.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.RuleResult.TrackersChanged
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the PassingRuleVector is different from the current value of the Trackers.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.RuleResult.UpdateResult(System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.String,System.Collections.BitArray,System.Collections.BitArray,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: True if the test result was passing.
True if the outgoing tracker was passing before evaluation.
The name of the passing SKU Group.
The passing bit vector for the included trackers.
The full passing bit vector for the rule.
Indicates that the PassingRuleVector is different from the current value of the trackers.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.DieRecoveryTrackerBase.RuleResult.ToString
member.summary: Create a printable summary of this data.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.ACMDecoder
member.summary: Defines the . This generic map type to convert different CTV data into failing index.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ACMDecoder.PinName
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of CTV bits to be read.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ACMDecoder.SharedStorageKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of CTV bits to be read.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.AnyFailSingleSliceDecoder
member.summary: Defines the . This is meant to be used for SCAN decoding, where each core is tested separately and any failure on a set of pins means that core (and only that core) should be marked as a failure.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.AnyFailSingleSliceDecoder.PinList
member.summary: Gets or sets the raw list of pins in this PinMap.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataEntry
member.summary: Common class for generic decoder. Supports matching on PatternNames, Labels/offsets, Domains, TraceRegister1.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataEntry.PatternName
member.summary: Gets or sets the Regex used to check the pattern name.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataEntry.Label
member.summary: Gets or sets the regex used to check against the previous label in the same location as the failure (subroutine or main).

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataEntry.Domain
member.summary: Gets or sets the regex used to check against the failing domain name. It should match domain for failing pins.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataEntry.Offset
member.summary: Gets or sets the offset from label/address.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataEntry.PinName
member.summary: Gets or sets the pin name.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataEntry.Register1
member.summary: Gets or sets the register 1 value.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataEntry.Index
member.summary: Gets or sets the index name.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataEntry.OffsetList
member.summary: Gets or sets converted list of offsets.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataEntry.PatternNameRegx
member.summary: Gets or sets pattern name regex object.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataEntry.LabelRegx
member.summary: Gets or sets label regex object.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataEntry.LabelIsInteger
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Label is a simple integer or not.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataEntry.LabelAsInteger
member.summary: Gets or sets the integer value of Label if LabelIsInteger is true.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataEntry.DomainRegx
member.summary: Gets or sets domain regex object.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataEntry.LabelCache
member.summary: Gets or sets the label cache (linked to parent).

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataEntry.Verify(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,DieRecoveryBase.LabelInfo)
member.summary: Build the Regex and initialize the instance.
member.param: Session Context for printing and other optimization.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataEntry.IsMatch(Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData,Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService)
member.summary: Check if the Prime Cycle Failure matches this object.
member.returns: True if the failure matches this object.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.LabelInfo
member.summary: Simple helper class for caching the last Label.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.LabelInfo.GetLabel(System.String,System.String,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Gets the label for the given pattern/domain/address.
member.returns: Label name and vector as an ILabel.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder
member.summary: Implements IConcurrentTraces.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets a description. Optional field.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.Variables
member.summary: Gets or sets mask targets configuration.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.MaskConfigurations
member.summary: Gets or sets mask targets configuration.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.StartPatterns
member.summary: Gets or sets mask targets configuration.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.Entries
member.summary: Gets or sets list of pattern entries.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.PlistElementOption
member.summary: Defined plist element options for concurrent traces.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.PlistElementOption.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the pattern name.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.PlistElementOption.Index
member.summary: Gets or sets the index in current patlist.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.PlistElementOption.Options
member.summary: Gets or sets PlistElementOptions values.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.MaskTarget
member.summary: Mask configuration entry.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.MaskTarget.Comment
member.summary: Gets or sets some optional comment.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.MaskTarget.TargetPositions
member.summary: Gets or sets the failing pattern occurrence.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.MaskTarget.PatternNames
member.summary: Gets or sets a list of regular expressions for pattern masking.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.MaskTarget.Options
member.summary: Gets or sets PlistElement options.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.ConfigurationEntry
member.summary: ConcurrentTracesConfiguration entry.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.ConfigurationEntry.Comment
member.summary: Gets or sets some optional comment.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.ConfigurationEntry.FailFilters
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of fail filters for a given entry.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.ConfigurationEntry.StartPattern
member.summary: Gets or sets the start pattern information for a given entry.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.ConfigurationEntry.FailFilter
member.summary: Defines fail filter for a given entry.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.ConfigurationEntry.FailFilter.Burst
member.summary: Gets or sets the failing burst.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.ConfigurationEntry.FailFilter.PatternName
member.summary: Gets or sets the failing pattern.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.ConfigurationEntry.FailFilter.UseRegx
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether PatternName should support regex matching.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.ConfigurationEntry.FailFilter.PatternOccurrence
member.summary: Gets or sets the failing pattern occurrence.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.ConfigurationEntry.FailFilter.FailingPins
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of failing pins by target position.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.ConfigurationEntry.FailFilter.TargetPositions
member.summary: Gets or sets the failing pattern occurrence.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.StartPatternInfo
member.summary: Defines start pattern information for a given entry.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.StartPatternInfo.PatternName
member.summary: Gets or sets the starting pattern.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.StartPatternInfo.PatternOccurrence
member.summary: Gets or sets the starting pattern.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.ConcurrentTracesDecoder.StartPatternInfo.PlistElementOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of optional plist element options.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.CtvDataDecoder
member.summary: Defines the . This generic map type to convert different CTV data into failing index.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.CtvDataDecoder.CtvCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of CTV bits to be decoded.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.CtvDataDecoder.Entries
member.summary: Gets or sets the CTV Decode map.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.CtvDataDecoder.CtvDataEntry
member.summary: CTV data entry for mapping.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.CtvDataDecoder.CtvDataEntry.PinName
member.summary: Gets or sets the pin name to read the CTV from.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.CtvDataDecoder.CtvDataEntry.Range
member.summary: Gets or sets the Range value. These are the bits in the full CTV string to read --> "0,1,2,3,5,6,7" or "0-3,05,6,7" or "0-3,5-7".

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.CtvDataDecoder.CtvDataEntry.PassingValues
member.summary: Gets or sets the List of Passing Values. Defaults to all 0's.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.CtvDataDecoder.CtvDataEntry.Index
member.summary: Gets or sets the Indexes to set in the output bitmask when this entry fails.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.CtvDataDecoder.CtvDataEntry.CtvLocations
member.summary: Gets the list of CTV bits to read for this entry.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.CtvDataDecoder.CtvDataEntry.PassingValuesDict
member.summary: Gets the optimized PassingValues structure.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataDecoder
member.summary: Defines the . This generic map type to convert different vector fail data information into failing index.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataDecoder.FailDataIndexMap
member.summary: Gets or sets the raw fail data to bit mapping.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataDecoder.DoaPins
member.summary: Gets or sets the DOA Pins. PinMasking gets skipped.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataDecoder.ForcePinMasking
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to force plist wide pin masking.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataDecoder.PatternsToProcess
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating the number of patterns to process. Zero or Negative value will process all.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.FailDataDecoder.LabelCache
member.summary: Gets or sets the local label cache (saves the last label).

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.LOG1Decoder
member.summary: Defines the . Log1 decoder.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.LOG1Decoder.DecoderMode
member.summary: Log1 mode.

member.name: F:DieRecoveryBase.LOG1Decoder.DecoderMode.MISR_ON
member.summary: log1 with pair.

member.name: F:DieRecoveryBase.LOG1Decoder.DecoderMode.MISR_OFF
member.summary: log1 no misr.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.LOG1Decoder.Log1DecoderType
member.summary: Gets or sets the decoder type [MISR_ON, MISR_OFF].

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.LOG1Decoder.Rehash
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Rehash is needed.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.LOG1Decoder.RecoveryTrackingName
member.summary: Gets or sets the recovery tracking Name.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapDecoderBase
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapDecoderBase.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapDecoderBase.Console
member.summary: Gets or sets a variable to hold the Prime.Console service or null based on the instances LogLevel.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapDecoderBase.SessionContext
member.summary: Gets or sets the Prime ISessionContextProviderContainer associated with this object.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapDecoderBase.CurrentMask
member.summary: Gets or sets the current mask bits.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapDecoderBase.ClearPatConfigCache(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Clears concurrent dictionary with all pat config handles.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapDecoderBase.SaveToSharedStorage
member.summary: Saves the decoder to shared storage.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapDecoderBase.RetrieveFromSharedStorage(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Reads the full DieRecovery PinMapBase table from shared storage.
member.exception: Thrown when the table doesn't exist.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapDecoderBase.ApplySetPoints(System.String,DDG.SetPoints)
member.summary: Applied patconfig setpoint.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapDecoderBase.GetPatConfigFromCache(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets a PatConfigHandle for the given PatConfig and Patlist, either creates a new copy or returns a previously cached copy.
member.returns: IPatConfigHandle for the given config and patlist.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapDecoderBase.GetPatConfigSetPointFromCache(System.String,System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets a PatConfigSetPointHandle from cache.
member.returns: IPatConfigHandle for the given config and patlist.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapDecoderExpressionContext
member.summary: Wraps the expression context to add additional parameter named 'value' to be used in the expression.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapDecoderExpressionContext.#ctor(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapDecoderExpressionContext.value
member.summary: Gets or sets the value to be used in the expression. Need to suppress SA1300 warning as the property name is defined by the expression.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.PinToSliceIndexDecoder
member.summary: Defines the . This is meant to be used for per-core testing like SBFT where each core maps to a different pin, and any failure on that pin means the corresponding core fails. It can support mapping multiple pins to a single core or a single pin to one or more cores.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.PinToSliceIndexDecoder.PinToSliceIndexMap
member.summary: Gets or sets the raw Pin to Slice Bits mapping.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.PinToSliceIndexDecoder.DoaPins
member.summary: Gets or sets the DOA Pins. PinMasking gets skipped.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.PinToSliceIndexDecoder.SliceIndexToPinMap
member.summary: Gets or sets the Slice Bit to Pin mapping.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.PinToSliceIndexDecoder.ReBuildAfterDeserialized(System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Helper function reconstruct non-serialized structures.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.RegisterCompareDecoder
member.summary: Defines the . This generic map type to convert different vector fail data information into failing index.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.RegisterCompareDecoder.LogModeEnum
member.summary: Specifies the logging mode for an operation or system.
member.remarks: This enumeration defines the available logging levels, allowing the caller to control the granularity of log output. Use to disable logging, to log only failures, or to log all events.

member.name: F:DieRecoveryBase.RegisterCompareDecoder.LogModeEnum.None
member.summary: No logging..

member.name: F:DieRecoveryBase.RegisterCompareDecoder.LogModeEnum.Fail
member.summary: Logging only failures.

member.name: F:DieRecoveryBase.RegisterCompareDecoder.LogModeEnum.All
member.summary: Represents a value that includes all possible options or states.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.RegisterCompareDecoder.ComparePins
member.summary: Gets or sets the register compare pins.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.RegisterCompareDecoder.CapturedBitsPerPattern
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of captured bits per pattern.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.RegisterCompareDecoder.Registers
member.summary: Gets or sets the register compare pins.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.RegisterCompareDecoder.RegistersMap
member.summary: Gets or sets the register compare map.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.RegisterCompareDecoder.LogMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the register compare pins.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.RegisterCompareDecoder.RegisterItem
member.summary: Represents a register item for the RegisterCompareDecoder.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.RegisterCompareDecoder.RegisterItem.Indexes
member.summary: Gets or sets of sets the indexes using a range string representation. Example: "0-3,5,7-9" will be converted to a list of indexes [0, 1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 8, 9].

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.RegisterCompareDecoder.RegisterItem.CtvPin
member.summary: Gets or sets the CTV PIN associated with the object.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.RegisterCompareDecoder.RegisterItem.Bits
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of bit values. List of strings represent the bits ranges for the register item.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.SafeZonesDecoder
member.summary: Defines the . This generic map type to convert different vector fail data information into failing index.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SafeZonesDecoder.SafeZones
member.summary: Gets or sets the safe zones.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SafeZonesDecoder.IgnoredPatternsRegx
member.summary: Gets or sets an ignored patterns regex..

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SafeZonesDecoder.IgnoredPatternMatcher
member.summary: Gets or sets the IStringMatcher to use for IgnoredPatternsRegx.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SafeZonesDecoder.SafeZonesOverride
member.summary: Gets or sets a list of safe zone patterns to override automatic detection algorithm.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SafeZonesDecoder.PatternIdPositions
member.summary: Gets or sets the pattern id positions. Typically, maps tuple and/or tid.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.SafeZonesDecoder.GetSafeZones(System.String)
member.summary: Identifies safe zones for target plist.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.SafeZonesDecoder.PreBurstPlistOption
member.summary: Class defines Instrumental patterns.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SafeZonesDecoder.PreBurstPlistOption.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the pattern name regx.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SafeZonesDecoder.PreBurstPlistOption.PreBurstListName
member.summary: Gets or sets PreBurstListName.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.SafeZonesDecoder.StartPattern
member.summary: Defines a pattern occurrence in a plist.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SafeZonesDecoder.StartPattern.Pattern
member.summary: Gets or sets the pattern name.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SafeZonesDecoder.StartPattern.PatternMatcher
member.summary: Gets or sets the pattern name.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SafeZonesDecoder.StartPattern.Index
member.summary: Gets or sets PreBurstListName.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SafeZonesDecoder.StartPattern.Occurrence
member.summary: Gets or sets PreBurstListName.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.SafeZonesDecoder.StartPattern.Burst
member.summary: Gets or sets PreBurstListName.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.SafeZonesDecoder.StartPattern.Verify
member.summary: Build the string matcher.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.SafeZonesDecoder.StartPattern.IsMatch(DDG.PatternOccurrence)
member.summary: Check if this object matches the PatternOccurence object.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapBase
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapBase.#ctor(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapBase.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of this PinMapBase.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapBase.FullTrackerSize
member.summary: Gets the full number of Tracker Bits associated with this PinMapBase.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapBase.FullVoltageTargetCount
member.summary: Gets the full number of Voltage Targets associated with this PinMapBase.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapBase.Configurations
member.summary: Gets or sets the PinMapBase Configuration objects.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapBase.Console
member.summary: Gets the Prime.Console service or null based on the instances LogLevel.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapBase.SessionContext
member.summary: Gets the Prime ISessionContextProviderContainer associated with this object.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapBase.CurrentMask
member.summary: Gets or sets the current mask value.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.PinMapBase.PreviousMask
member.summary: Gets or sets the previous mask value.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.TrackerElement
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.TrackerElement.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the Name of the Data.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.TrackerElement.Size
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of bits in this structure.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.TrackerElement.InitialValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the initial value for the tracker.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.TrackerElement.SessionContext
member.summary: Gets or sets the Prime ISessionContextProviderContainer associated with this object.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.TrackerElement.Clone(System.String)
member.summary: Clones current tracker.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.TrackerElement.SaveDefinition(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Stores the Tracker definition in shared storage.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.TrackerElement.SaveData(System.String)
member.summary: Updates the current data for this tracker.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.TrackerElement.TryGetData(System.String@)
member.summary: Gets the current data for this tracker or a default value that is passed in.
member.param: Current Data if it has data.
member.returns: true if the tracker data is valid.

member.name: M:DieRecoveryBase.TrackerElement.GetDefinition(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the named Tracker Definition from shared storage.

member.name: T:DieRecoveryBase.TrackerTable
member.summary: Defines the . This class is only meant to read in the Tracker configuration file. It is not used to track current data.

member.name: P:DieRecoveryBase.TrackerTable.Trackers
member.summary: Gets or sets the Trackers.

member.name: T:DDG.DieRecovery
member.summary: Singleton for DieRecovery service.
Defines the Flags in .
Defines the Flags in .
Defines the Flags in .

member.name: F:DDG.DieRecovery.Separator
member.summary: Standard separator.

member.name: F:DDG.DieRecovery.SeparatorForLogging
member.summary: Separator for logging.

member.name: P:DDG.DieRecovery.Service
member.summary: Gets or sets Dlvr service implementation.

member.name: T:DDG.DieRecovery.Flag
member.summary: Enum containing DieRecovery Flags.

member.name: F:DDG.DieRecovery.Flag.AreTrackerChangesAllowed
member.summary: Flag to indicate that Tracker Changes (ie downbins) are allowed.

member.name: F:DDG.DieRecovery.Flag.IsHistoryEnabled
member.summary: Flag to indicate that Tracker History (ie saving all tests which update a tracker) is enabled.

member.name: F:DDG.DieRecovery.Flag.IsPreTestCheckEnabled
member.summary: Flag to indicate that PreTest Rules check is enabled (for sort force flow).

member.name: T:DDG.DieRecovery.Flags
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:DDG.DieRecovery.Flags.Default(DDG.DieRecovery.Flag)
member.summary: Gets the default value for a flag if it's not set.

member.name: M:DDG.DieRecovery.Flags.GetKey(DDG.DieRecovery.Flag)
member.summary: Gets the SharedStorage key for a flag.

member.name: M:DDG.DieRecovery.Flags.GetContext
member.summary: Gets the SharedStorage context for a flag.

member.name: T:DDG.DieRecovery.TrackerRecord
member.summary: Defines the Flags in .

member.name: M:DDG.DieRecovery.TrackerRecord.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. This is used to store the history of every tracker.
member.param: Name of the test making the update.

member.name: P:DDG.DieRecovery.TrackerRecord.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the tracker.

member.name: P:DDG.DieRecovery.TrackerRecord.PreviousValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the previous/current value of this tracker.

member.name: P:DDG.DieRecovery.TrackerRecord.NewValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the new/updated value of this tracker.

member.name: P:DDG.DieRecovery.TrackerRecord.Test
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the test that caused the update.

member.name: T:DDG.DieRecovery.History
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:DDG.DieRecovery.History.Get(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the tracking history for a tracker.

member.name: M:DDG.DieRecovery.History.Add(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Updates the tracking history for the tracker.
member.param: Name of the test making the update.

member.name: T:DDG.DieRecovery.Table
member.summary: Defines the die recovery table types.

member.name: F:DDG.DieRecovery.Table.TrackerNames
member.summary: Table containing the names of all existing Trackers.

member.name: F:DDG.DieRecovery.Table.PinMapDecoderNames
member.summary: Table containing the names of all existing PinMapDecoders.

member.name: F:DDG.DieRecovery.Table.RuleNames
member.summary: Table containing the names of all existing Rules.

member.name: F:DDG.DieRecovery.Table.SkuRuleNames
member.summary: Table containing the names of all existing Rules.

member.name: F:DDG.DieRecovery.Table.SkuDefinition
member.summary: Table containing the names of all existing SKUs.

member.name: T:DDG.DieRecovery.Tables
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: M:DDG.DieRecovery.Tables.Add(DDG.DieRecovery.Table,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Adds an item to the stored list.
member.param: Name of the StoredList table to add to.

member.name: M:DDG.DieRecovery.Tables.Get(DDG.DieRecovery.Table,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the full stored list.
member.param: Name of the table to get.

member.name: T:DDG.IDieRecovery
member.summary: Interface for main DieRecovery object.

member.name: P:DDG.IDieRecovery.ResetValue
member.summary: Gets the Reset/Initial value associated with this DieRecovery Tracker.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecovery.Read
member.summary: Returns the Tracking Structure as a BitArray, true elements are ones which should be masked.
member.returns: The containing the plist mask, true elements should be masked.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecovery.Write(System.Collections.BitArray,System.Collections.BitArray,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Run the rules on the given testResults and if they pass, write the result to the trackers.
member.param: The testResults to update the tracking structure with.
Bit array specifying which slice bits should be ignored. Elements set to true means that bit will ignore the testResults and use the current value of the tracker. Default is null (all bits enabled).
Indicating whether the new data should overwrite existing data or be merged (default is Merge).
Boolean indicating whether to log the update to Ituff or not (default true==PrintToItuff).
Skips the RunRules and just writes testResults directly to the trackers.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecovery.RunRule(System.Collections.BitArray,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Run the SKU based rule associated with this tracker. If it passes, the passing bit vector associated with this tracker is returned.
member.param: BitVector with the pass/fail test results for this Tracking structure.
Boolean indicating if tracking and test results should be merged for evaluation.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecovery.Log(System.Collections.BitArray,System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Logs current test data without updating current tracker.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecovery.SetRule(System.String)
member.summary: Associates the give SKU based rule with this Tracking structure. This rule will be run when the RunRule or Write methods are invoked.
member.param: Name of the SKU based ruleName.

member.name: T:DDG.IDieRecoveryFactory
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: P:DDG.IDieRecoveryFactory.CurrentSlice
member.summary: Gets or sets current slice index.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecoveryFactory.GetTrackingStructure(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates a Tracking Structure for the given comma-separated list of Trackers.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecoveryFactory.GetPinMap(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Create a PinMap object with the given comma-separated list of PinMap Decoder configurations.
member.param: Comma-separated list of PinMap Decoder names.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecoveryFactory.GetDecoder(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the named PinMapDecoder from shared storage.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecoveryFactory.GetSkuRule(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the named DieRecovery SKU based Rule.
member.param: Name of the rule to get.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecoveryFactory.GetSKU(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the named DieRecovery SKU definition.
member.param: Recovery area where the sku is located.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecoveryFactory.GetTrackerDefinition(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the named DieRecovery Tracker Definition.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecoveryFactory.GetHistory(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the full history of which tests updated trackers. Return dictionary is keys=Tracker, value=list of updates.
member.param: tracker name for matching. If null or empty it will pull full history.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecoveryFactory.SetFlag(DDG.DieRecovery.Flag,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Internal function to set a flag.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecoveryFactory.GetFlag(DDG.DieRecovery.Flag,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the value for the given DieRecovery Flag.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecoveryFactory.GetTable(DDG.DieRecovery.Table,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the contents of a DieRecovery Table.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecoveryFactory.CloneTracker(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Clones tracker definition and data using new tracker name.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecoveryFactory.LoadTrackerFile(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Loads the given Json file containing DieRecovery Tracker definitions.
member.param: Json file containing DieRecovery Tracker definitions.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecoveryFactory.LoadSkuDefinitionFile(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Loads the given SKU Recovery XML file and saves the skus to shared storage.
member.param: Name of the xml file to load.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecoveryFactory.LoadSkuRulesFile(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Loads the given SKU Rules Json file and saves the rules to shared storage.
member.param: Name of the json file to load.

member.name: M:DDG.IDieRecoveryFactory.LoadPinMapDecoderFile(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Loads the given Json file containing DieRecovery Tracker definitions.
member.param: Json file containing DieRecovery PinMap Decoder definitions.
Type of the decoder to load.

member.name: T:DDG.IPinMapDecoder
member.summary: Defines the .

member.name: P:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the Name of this PlistDecoder object.

member.name: P:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.IpPatternConfigure
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the Pattern Configuration used to Enable/Disable this IP.

member.name: P:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.IpPatConfigSetPoints
member.summary: Gets or sets a list of PatConfigSetPoints used to Enable/Disable this IP.

member.name: P:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.IpPlistModifications
member.summary: Gets or sets a list of Plist element modifications list used to Enable/Disable this IP.

member.name: P:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.BitwiseNot
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether data should apply a bitwise not operation.

member.name: P:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.NumberOfTrackerElements
member.summary: Gets or sets the Size of the Tracker BitArray generated by this decoder.

member.name: P:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.VoltageTargetGroups
member.summary: Gets or sets how many Tracker bits to consume for each VoltageTarget. Normally the decoder represents a single voltage target which consumes all the tracker bits, but if a decoder is attached to multiple voltage targets, use this to specify how the bits are assigned.

member.name: P:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.SharedStorageResults
member.summary: Gets or sets the decoder result in the indicated SharedStorage token.

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.GetDecoderType
member.summary: Returns typeof decoder as string. Base implementation should be sufficient for most decoders.

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.GetFailTrackerFromPlistResults(Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalTest)
member.summary: Generates a BitArray where each element refers to a separately tracked item (usually core or slice). A true value means that element had a failure.
member.param: A object containing the test execution results.

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.MaskPlistFromTracker(Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalTest@)
member.summary: Given a BitArray with one element per tracked item, where true means that element had a failure, returns the list of pins to mask. The functionalTest is pass-by-reference so it can be updated, however the pin masking should not be done here. Called from IPinMap.MaskPins() and IPinMap.GetMaskPins(). Base implementation returns an empty list.
member.param: A object containing the functionalTest to mask.
member.returns: The list of pins to mask.

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.GetPatConfigForSliceControl(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a to enable/disable this IP according to the given BitArray. Base implementation should be sufficient for most decoders.
member.param: Specific PList to associated with the pattern modify (if null or string.Empty, it should affect all plists).

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.ApplyPatConfigSetPointForSliceControl(System.String)
member.summary: Applies a list of to enable/disable this IP according to the given BitArray. Base implementation should be sufficient for most decoders.
member.param: Specific PList to associated with the pattern modify (if null or string.Empty, it should affect all plists).

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.ApplyPlistSettings(System.String)
member.summary: Applies plist settings for the given IFunctionalTestForSearch object using the BitArray representing a Tracking structure. Base implementation doesn't do anything. Called from IPinMap.MaskPins() and IPinMap.GetMaskPins().
member.param: PList object to apply the mask to.

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.Restore
member.summary: Resets or restores patterns and/or plists based on decoder configuration. Should undo any per-Unit state. Called from IPinMap.Restore().

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.SaveResultsToSharedStorage(System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Saves decoded result to SharedStorage token specified in the configuration file. Base implementation should be sufficient for most decoders. Called from IPinMap.DecodeFailure().

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.Verify(Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalTest@)
member.summary: Verify routine to be called during init.

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.SetCurrentSlice(System.Int32)
member.summary: Not Used. Use DDG.DieRecovery.Service.CurrentSlice instead.

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMapDecoder.SetCurrentMask(System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Sets current mask to be applied. Base implementation should be enough for most decoders. Called from IPinMap.SetCurrentMask().

member.name: T:DDG.PlistElementModifications
member.summary: PlistElementModifications settings.

member.name: P:DDG.PlistElementModifications.Indexes
member.summary: Gets or sets the bit vector positions.

member.name: P:DDG.PlistElementModifications.Values
member.summary: Gets or sets the values to match.

member.name: P:DDG.PlistElementModifications.Masks
member.summary: Gets or sets the masks to match.

member.name: P:DDG.PlistElementModifications.EnablePatternsRegex
member.summary: Gets or sets regex for patterns to enable.

member.name: P:DDG.PlistElementModifications.DisablePatternsRegex
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of set points to apply.

member.name: T:DDG.SetPoints
member.summary: SetPoint settings.

member.name: P:DDG.SetPoints.Indexes
member.summary: Gets or sets the bit vector positions.

member.name: P:DDG.SetPoints.Values
member.summary: Gets or sets the values to match.

member.name: P:DDG.SetPoints.Masks
member.summary: Gets or sets the masks to match.

member.name: P:DDG.SetPoints.PatConfigSetPoints
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of set points to apply.

member.name: P:DDG.SetPoints.SharedStorageTokens
member.summary: Gets or sets a dictionary of shared storage tokens to set using expression engine.

member.name: P:DDG.SetPoints.UseLambda
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether expression should be converted to a lambda function.

member.name: T:DDG.IPinMap
member.summary: Base definition of the Recovery PinMapBase Interface.

member.name: P:DDG.IPinMap.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of this PinMapBase.

member.name: P:DDG.IPinMap.FullTrackerSize
member.summary: Gets the full number of Tracker Bits associated with this PinMapBase.

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMap.SetCurrentMask(System.Collections.BitArray,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets current mask bits.
member.param: Bit array containing the mask to apply.

members.member:
Updates the pin masking for the given IFunctionalTestForSearch object using the BitArray representing a Tracking structure.
/// PList object. Additional masked pins. They will be added to the resulting list.

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMap.GetMaskPins(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Gets the Pins to mask from the BitArray representing a Tracking structure.
member.param: Additional masked pins. They will be added to the resulting list.

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMap.ApplyPlistSettings(System.String)
member.summary: Applies plist settings. This is expected to be called along with MaskPins.

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMap.Reset
member.summary: Resets variables to initial states.

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMap.Restore
member.summary: Runs a restore routine. Used for restoring patterns and/or plist to their original states.

members.member:
Verify routine to be called during Init.
/// PList object.

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMap.DecodeFailure(Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalTest)
member.summary: Decodes the failure for the given IFunctionalTest based on the pin mapping. Implemented decoder will need to cast object to the specific IFunctionalTest implementation. Returns a BitArray with each element representing pass (false) or fail (true) for each element in the Tracking structure.

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMap.FailTrackerToFailVoltageDomains(System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Converts the FailTracker BitVector to a BitVector representing Failing Voltage Domains.
member.returns: BitArray with true for each failing voltage domain.

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMap.VoltageDomainsToFailTracker(System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Expands a BitArray from 1 bit per voltage domain to 1 bit per fail tracker bit. This is the opposite of FailTrackerToFailVoltageDomains().
member.param: BitArray with 1 bit per voltage target/domain.
member.returns: BitArray with 1 Bit per fail tracker.

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMap.ApplyPatConfig(System.String)
member.summary: Applies the IP Enable/Disable pattern modify associated with this PinMapBase object using the supplied BitArray.
member.param: Specific PList to apply the pattern modify to.
member.exception: thrown if there's a problem with the patmodify.

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMap.ApplyPatConfig
member.summary: Applies the IP Enable/Disable pattern modify associated with this PinMapBase object using the supplied BitArray.
member.exception: thrown if there's a problem with the patmodify.

member.name: M:DDG.IPinMap.GetConfiguration
member.summary: Returns list of pinmaps and expected size.

member.name: T:DDG.PrimeDefeatureTracker
member.summary: Wrapper for Prime Defeature Tracking Service.

member.name: M:DDG.PrimeDefeatureTracker.#ctor(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:DDG.PrimeDefeatureTracker.Handler
member.summary: Gets or sets the prime Handler for tracking structure.

member.name: M:DDG.PrimeDefeatureTracker.RunRule(System.Collections.BitArray,System.Collections.BitArray,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Run the rule on the given testResults and if it passes, write the result to the trackers.
